heading: Transferred
label: 1801 to 1819 Transferred
notes: CodificationThe Atomic Energy Act of 1946, which was formerly classified to sections 1801 to 1819 of this title, was , . Act , was renamed the Atomic Energy Act of 1954 and completely amended by , , and is classified principally to chapter 23 (§ 2011 et seq.) of this title. Provisions enacted in the , amendment largely corresponded to and expanded upon the provisions in the original Atomic Energy Act of 1946, as described below.act Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 72460 Stat. 755act Aug. 30, 1954, ch. 1073, § 168 Stat. 919Aug. 1, 1946Aug. 30, 1954Section 1801, , , related to declaration of policy and purpose of chapter.
